sha.name: Courtyard by Marriott Bangkok
sha.detail: Courtyard by Marriott Bangkok offers a fresh new perspective on business and leisure travel. This inviting hotel in Bangkok emphasises quality experiences and affordable accommodations combined with tranquility in the heart of Asia's most dynamic and cosmopolitan city. A young and energetic team personalises every guest's visit and commits to the little details that add up to a memorable stay.

sha.name: Colosseum Show Pattaya
sha.detail: Colosseum Show is a brand new cabaret-theatre on a colossal scale. It is destined to be one of the leading cabaret shows that Pattaya has to offer.  Meet the rare talents and astounding beauty of Thai transgender entertainers in an extravaganza fully equipped with glitzy and glamorous costumes and stylish set designs, top of the range lighting and sound effects.  Colosseum Show is guaranteed to exceed your expectations and provide you with never before seen world class entertainment.

sha.name: Citadines Sukhumvit 11 Bangkok
sha.detail: It is in the very heart of this booming metropolis where Citadines Sukhumvit 11 Bangkok lies. The apart’hotel sits squarely on Sukhumvit Road, just a 5-minute drive to Nana skytrain station and is within a walking distance to the renowned nightlife and shopping districts along the Sukhumvit road.At the end of a long day out and about, retire to Citadines Sukhumvit 11 Bangkok to rejuvenate. The serviced residence offers our guests the ability to customise and individualise their travel plans to suit their globetrotting requirements. Stylish and modernly furnished, the apartments offer a choice of cleverly designed apartments ranging from studios to two-bedroom layouts that come fitted with modern bathrooms, a well-equipped kitchenette as well as a workstation for when work beckons.Citadines guests will also gain full access to the residence’s comprehensive facilities such as our on-site fitness corner, swimming pool, self-service launderette and business corner as well as optional services including airport transfer, laundry & dry cleaning and daily breakfast. A tuk-tuk shuttle to the Nana BTS skytrain station is available for residents free of charge.

sha.name: Citadines Sukhumvit 16 Bangkok
sha.detail: Situated right in the heart of Bangkok’s bustling Sukhumvit business, shopping and entertainment district, Citadines Sukhumvit 16 Bangkok puts you in the thick of the action, while giving you the quiet comfort of a serviced residence.At the end of a long day out, retire to Citadines Sukhumvit 16 Bangkok to rejuvenate. The apart’hotel offers our guests the ability to customise travel plans. Appealingly and modernly furnished, the apartments come in various sizes, ranging from cleverly designed studios to one-bedroom apartments that come fitted with bathrooms, a well-equipped kitchenette as well as complimentary Wi-Fi in every apartment and all public area.Citadines guests will also gain full access to the residence’s facilities such as our on-site fitness corner, swimming pool, self-service launderette and business corner as well as optional services, including airport transfer, laundry and dry cleaning and daily breakfast.
